segment_insights.action: Protect this segment. Prioritise dedicated account management, proactive QBRs, and executive sponsorship. Upsell opportunities exist given high LTV ($12,309/customer).
Launch early-warning churn signals and proactive outreach. Increase product adoption initiatives. Segment churn of 8.1% is above the healthy threshold of 5%.

Immediate churn prevention campaign required. Investigate root causes: onboarding gaps, product-fit issues, support quality. Consider a dedicated success programme for this segment. 13.3% churn on 1,200.0 customers = 159 lost customers per cycle.
